description: Source file size policy for Semiotic. New or growing files must stay under the hard limits. Existing oversized files are listed with a ratchet ceiling (maxLines). Prefer splitting modules over raising maxLines.

allowlist.reason: Grandfathered production file above hard limit (800). Split on meaningful touch; do not grow past maxLines.
